summary: RETEST iteration_12 bug fix: Dashboard.jsx load() now fetches /api/reports/booking-widgets and calls setWidgets(w.data). VERIFIED PASS: all 7 dashboard widgets render actual numeric values matching API. Backend smoke regression (test_phase_d.py 8/8 PASS): widgets endpoint shape + numeric + $toDouble; cancel-with-fee all 4 paths (success, too-late, wrong-status, not-found). bd-wa-confirm + pb-success-wa already verified in iteration_12 (code unchanged).

issues: LEFTOVER FROM ITER_12 (cosmetic, unchanged): 'Kirim Konfirmasi WA' button text clipped due to 4 buttons in DialogFooter at 1920px. Functional but visual issue.

action_items: OPTIONAL/LOW: shorten 'Kirim Konfirmasi WA' label or wrap DialogFooter (iter_12 leftover, cosmetic only).

BACKEND TEST HYGIENE: test_phase_d.py picks the first kosong room — running it twice rapidly without cleanup can fail with 'Kamar sudah dibooking pada rentang ini' because parallel xdist workers (-n auto from pytest.ini) collide. Workaround: run with -n0, or update _create_booking_paid() to use a unique offset per worker. NOT a product bug — test infra only.
critical_code_review_comments: Dashboard.jsx L44-57: Promise.all now fetches 5 endpoints serially-parallel including /reports/booking-widgets. polled every 30s — fine for now, but consider adding loading state to widgets row (currently silently re-renders).

Dashboard.jsx L252-258: ?? '—' fallback works for booking_hari_ini/pending/paid/online_month/walkin_month but for w-rev-online and w-mt-total uses || 0 which would display 'Rp 0' / '0 trx' silently if widgets===null. Considered correct after fetch lands, but pre-fetch flash shows 0 not '—'. Minor UX inconsistency.

test_phase_d.py L66: `room = next((r for r in rooms if r.get('status') == 'kosong'), rooms[0])` picks first kosong room — fragile under parallel test execution. Recommend selecting a different room per test or using a TEST-only room.

success_rate.backend: 100% (8/8 pytest pass after sequential run + stale TEST_PHASE_D cleanup)
success_rate.frontend: 100% (7/7 widgets verified: w-today=1, w-pending=6, w-paid=2, w-rev-online=Rp 123.600, w-mt-total=2 trx, w-online-month=33, w-walkin-month=29 — all match GET /api/reports/booking-widgets)

seed_data_creation: Cleared 2 stale TEST_PHASE_D bookings from a prior crashed run via mongosh `db.bookings.deleteMany({catatan:'TEST_PHASE_D'})`. Current test_phase_d.py self-cleans via _cleanup() after each test.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Dashboard widgets fix is fully verified. Backend regression test_phase_d.py must be run with `-n0` to avoid xdist worker room conflict, and ensure /app/backend/.env is sourced (MONGO_URL, DB_NAME) plus REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL exported before pytest. Outstanding from iter_12 (not retested here, deferred): bd-cancel-refund UI flow on a booking_paid record (needs Midtrans webhook simulation or mongo mutation).
rca_of_the_issue: BUG (iter_12): Dashboard widgets showed fallback values. FIX VERIFIED: Dashboard.jsx load() Promise.all now includes api.get('/reports/booking-widgets') at line 51 and setWidgets(w.data) at line 55. Re-tested via Playwright + DOM scrape + parallel /api/reports/booking-widgets fetch — all 7 widgets show actual values matching API exactly (1, 6, 2, Rp 123.600, 2 trx, 33, 29).
